blended.narrative: Attitash is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
